dash_gps_note: * We will securely record your GPS location if you allow it.
dash_must_login_desc: Please login to report a civic issue in your area.
dash_no_complaints: No civic issues reported yet. Be the first to make a difference!
home_hero_subtitle: Together we can build a stronger, safer, and cleaner community.
issue_potholes_desc: Report severely damaged roads causing traffic delays or safety hazards.
issue_water_desc: Flag broken pipes, contaminated water, or supply shortages in your block.
issue_garbage_desc: Notify authorities of uncollected trash dumps or sanitation emergencies.
issue_street_desc: Report dark areas or broken lighting to keep neighborhoods safe at night.
issue_drainage_desc: Report blocked drains, flooding, or overflowing storm water lines.
issue_other_desc: Report any other public service or neighborhood issue that needs attention.
how_it_works_step_1_desc: Sign in to access the complaint reporting and tracking features.
how_it_works_step_2_desc: Submit your complaint using text details and clear image evidence.
how_it_works_step_3_desc: The civic team reviews the report and investigates the issue.
how_it_works_step_4_desc: If the complaint is valid, strict action is taken and the issue is resolved.
how_it_works_step_5_desc: You receive a message once the issue has been solved.
how_it_works_step_6_desc: Share your feedback on the resolution so the service can improve further.
smart_feature_ai_desc: Automatically detects issue categories and verifies visual evidence using AI/ML.
smart_feature_gps_desc: Pinpoints the exact location of reports automatically to help maintenance crews reach the spot faster.
smart_feature_alerts_desc: Keeps citizens informed with automatic notifications at every stage from submission to resolution.
smart_feature_analytics_desc: Provides administrators with data visualization and heatmaps to prioritize high-incidence areas.
smart_feature_duplicate_desc: Flags duplicate reports for the same issue to consolidate efforts and avoid redundant work.
smart_feature_feedback_desc: Allows citizens to rate resolutions and auto-escalate unresolved issues to higher authorities.
faq_q1_title: How long does it take to resolve a complaint?
faq_q1_desc: Typically, complaints are reviewed within 24 hours. Minor issues like streetlights or potholes are resolved within 3-5 working days, while major sanitation or drainage issues may take 7-10 working days.
faq_q2_title: Can I report an issue anonymously?
faq_q2_desc: To prevent spam, you must create an account. However, your private credentials are kept secure and are not shown publicly on the tracking dashboard.
faq_q3_title: What categories of issues can I report?
faq_q3_desc: You can report potholes, damaged roads, water line leakages, sewage blockages, dark/broken streetlights, uncollected garbage, or choose 'Other' for general municipal complaints.
faq_q4_title: How do I track my complaint status?
faq_q4_desc: Simply go to the 'Track Complaint' tab or dashboard. You will see real-time updates: 'Submitted', 'Under Review', 'In Progress', or 'Resolved', alongside notes from the assigned officer.
faq_q5_title: What should I do if the issue is not resolved properly?
faq_q5_desc: After resolution, you can rate the service and provide feedback. If the resolution is unsatisfactory, you can request an escalation through your dashboard to senior civic authorities.
footer_desc: Empowering citizens to report, track, and resolve local civic issues in partnership with municipal authorities.
footer_copyright: © 2026 CivicConnect. All rights reserved. Government of India Initiative.
track_page_subtitle: Enter your registered email or complaint ID to check the real-time status of your complaint.
track_error_empty: Please enter an email address or complaint ID to search.
track_error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
track_no_results_desc: We could not find any complaints matching your search. Please double-check your email or complaint ID and try again.
